name: opsm-mcp
description: Odds-and-Sods Package Manager (OPSM) gateway. Routes package search, install, dependency resolution (PubGrub), and registry management across 103 registry adapters (npm, cargo, hex, pypi, affinescript, rattlescript, eclexia, guix, nix, and more). State machine enforces valid registry slot lifecycle via Zig FFI.

tools.name: opsm_search
tools.description: Search for packages across all configured registries. Returns matching packages with name, version, description, and registry source.

query.description: Package name or keyword to search for

registry.description: Limit search to a specific registry (e.g. 'affinescript', 'cargo', 'npm'). Omit to search all.

tools.name: opsm_install
tools.description: Install a package from any registry. Resolves the package, downloads it, verifies checksums, and installs into the workspace.

version.description: Package version or version constraint (default: latest)

tools.name: opsm_resolve
tools.description: Resolve the full dependency tree for a manifest using the PubGrub algorithm. Returns the resolved set of packages and versions, or a conflict explanation if resolution fails.

manifest.description: Manifest file content (affine.toml, Cargo.toml, mix.exs, etc.)

manifest_format.description: Manifest format hint (e.g. 'affine', 'cargo', 'hex'). Auto-detected if omitted.

tools.name: opsm_info
tools.description: Fetch metadata for a package: description, versions, authors, license, dependencies, and attestations.

version.description: Specific version to look up (default: latest)

tools.name: opsm_list
tools.description: List installed packages in a workspace. Returns name, version, registry, and direct/transitive classification for each installed package.

workspace_root.description: Workspace root directory (uses current directory if omitted)

tools.name: opsm_registries
tools.description: List all 103 registry adapters with their names, slot indices, current state (disconnected/connected/querying/idle), and supported operations.

filter_state.description: Filter to only registries in this state (optional)

tools.name: opsm_status
tools.description: Return the OPSM service health status, version, registry count, resolver algorithm, and security configuration.
